div.p: Converting predicates → cardinality estimates using equi-depth histograms

g.text: def selectivity_for_range(self, op: str, value: Any) -> float:

text.tspan: Range: col > value, col < value, etc.
Range: col > value, col < value, etc.

g.text: Reality: 180 rows have value=50, 20 rows spread over 19 other values
Solution: More buckets, or track most-common-values separately
